claim_under_attack: Under high ambiguity, the board should endorse a posture (explore/defend/commit) rather than approve specific resource allocation, because the cost structure of premature commitment vs. bounded delay is asymmetric.
evidence_or_reason: The claim asserts an asymmetric cost structure but provides no case-specific evidence for that asymmetry and no support for why posture endorsement is more decision-useful than concrete resource decisions in this scenario. The artifact itself admits there is no company data and even notes the logic depends on a non-survival context, so the recommendation rests on an unvalidated assumption rather than visible evidence.
